roadmap.title: Learn placement and clear one-match unlocks
roadmap.description: Use Casual Mode to earn a first kill, four-kill match, first blood, pacifist top 10, revive, full boost, stolen outfit, pan finish, and early placement progress while jumping from every plane.

roadmap.title: Farm required weapon counters in Casual Squads
roadmap.description: Solo-queue into Casual Squads during the current 60-minute daily allowance, use grouped bots for class-specific finishes, and work through CQB, marksman, grenade, fist, sniper-headshot, crossbow, and suppressed-weapon milestones.

roadmap.title: Sweep care packages, loadouts, and vehicles
roadmap.description: Use central drops and a vehicle to loot 50 care-package items, assemble ten Lv.3 sets and a three-slot suppressed loadout, then finish both vehicle-kill types and the carried-enemy passenger setup.

roadmap.title: Secure mode wins and finish cumulative grinds
roadmap.description: Win Solo, regular Duo, and Squad matches, stay connected when spectating a surviving team, reach ten Chicken Dinners, complete 101 aircraft jumps, and finish the 1,000-kill counter last.

achievements.description: Win a game 10 times.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 10 Battle Royale victories across Solo, Duo, and/or Squad modes.

guide.context: Mode-specific Chicken Dinners all feed this aggregate. Casual Squads are the most forgiving repeat route, and a spectated team victory counts if you stay until the end.

steps.text: Finish the Solo, Duo, and Squad victory achievements first so those wins enter the aggregate.
Continue playing Casual Squads with fill enabled and remain through every result screen, including matches where you die before teammates win.
Stop after the tenth recorded Chicken Dinner unlocks the achievement.

achievements.description: Obtain a Chicken Dinner in Solo.
achievements.summary: Win a Solo Battle Royale match and receive the Solo Chicken Dinner result.

guide.context: Squad and Duo victories cannot satisfy the Solo-specific achievement. Casual Solo offers more bots than a standard lobby while preserving the Solo result category.

steps.text: Queue specifically for @mechanic{Casual Solo} and survive through each Blue Zone phase.
Eliminate the final opponent or remain as the last survivor, then stay through the @mechanic{Winner Winner Chicken Dinner} result screen.

achievements.description: Obtain a Chicken Dinner in Duos.
achievements.summary: Win a regular Duo Battle Royale match and receive the Duo Chicken Dinner result.

guide.context: Duo is not offered in Casual Mode. If you are eliminated while your partner survives, remain connected and spectate; the team victory still counts when the final result appears.

steps.text: Queue for regular @mechanic{Duos} with a partner or matchmaking fill enabled.
Play for placement and keep at least one teammate alive through the final fight.
Remain in the match until the Duo team receives the Chicken Dinner result, even if your character was eliminated earlier.

achievements.description: Obtain a Chicken Dinner in Squads.
achievements.summary: Win a Squad Battle Royale match and receive the Squad Chicken Dinner result.

guide.context: Casual Squads combine human teammates with bot-heavy opposition. A team win counts for eliminated squad members only if they remain connected through the result.

steps.text: Queue for @mechanic{Casual Squads} with fill enabled and coordinate rotations with the team.
If eliminated, do not leave; spectate until the squad defeats the final opposing team and the Chicken Dinner screen appears.

achievements.description: Reach the top 10 10 times.
achievements.summary: Finish within the top 10 in 10 separate Battle Royale matches.

guide.context: Low-traffic drops and early rotations are safer than hot drops. Record one qualifying placement per match; a single win cannot add multiple entries.

steps.text: Use Casual Solo or Squads, land outside major towns, and keep a vehicle for each Blue Zone rotation.
Survive until the match placement reaches 10 or better, then repeat in 10 different matches.

achievements.description: Reach the top 10 without killing anyone.
achievements.summary: Reach the final 10 in a match without personally killing an enemy.

guide.context: Teammate kills do not break the personal zero-kill condition. A Solo attempt gives clearer placement feedback, while a Squad attempt lets you drive and hide as teammates fight.

steps.text: Queue for @mechanic{Casual Solo}, land far from the flight path, and loot healing supplies without engaging opponents.
Move into each safe zone early, hide away from roads and compounds, and remain alive until the placement counter reaches the top 10 with zero kills.

achievements.description: Kill 200 players with a shotgun, a submachine gun, and/or a pistol.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 200 credited eliminations with shotguns, submachine guns, and/or pistols.

guide.context: Casual Squad bots count. You may knock an opponent with another weapon, but use an eligible weapon for the final damage so the kill feed and achievement counter credit the required class.

steps.text: Queue alone into @mechanic{Casual Squads} and carry a shotgun, SMG, or pistol.
Knock opponents with any weapon if needed, switch to the eligible weapon, and deliver the final damage before another player finishes them.
Continue until 200 credited eliminations have registered for this weapon family.

achievements.description: Kill 50 players with a shotgun, a submachine gun, and/or a pistol.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 50 credited eliminations with shotguns, submachine guns, and/or pistols.

guide.context: Casual Squad bots count. You may knock an opponent with another weapon, but use an eligible weapon for the final damage so the kill feed and achievement counter credit the required class.

steps.text: Queue alone into @mechanic{Casual Squads} and carry a shotgun, SMG, or pistol.
Knock opponents with any weapon if needed, switch to the eligible weapon, and deliver the final damage before another player finishes them.
Continue until 50 credited eliminations have registered for this weapon family.

achievements.description: Kill 10 players with a shotgun, a submachine gun, and/or a pistol.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 10 credited eliminations with shotguns, submachine guns, and/or pistols.

guide.context: Casual Squad bots count. You may knock an opponent with another weapon, but use an eligible weapon for the final damage so the kill feed and achievement counter credit the required class.

steps.text: Queue alone into @mechanic{Casual Squads} and carry a shotgun, SMG, or pistol.
Knock opponents with any weapon if needed, switch to the eligible weapon, and deliver the final damage before another player finishes them.
Continue until 10 credited eliminations have registered for this weapon family.

achievements.description: Kill 100 players with an assault rifle and/or a sniper rifle from over 100 meters away.
achievements.summary: Eliminate 100 enemies with an assault rifle or sniper rifle from more than 100 meters away.

guide.context: The counter may sometimes advance on a closer kill, but the displayed requirement remains over 100 meters. Use a map marker to confirm the distance before delivering the final shot.

steps.text: Carry an assault rifle or sniper rifle with a magnified optic and use map pings to confirm a firing distance beyond @mechanic{100 meters}.
Knock or damage the target at range, then deliver the credited final shot with the eligible assault rifle or sniper rifle.
Repeat until 100 qualifying long-range eliminations register.

achievements.description: Kill 30 players with an assault rifle and/or a sniper rifle from over 100 meters away.
achievements.summary: Eliminate 30 enemies with an assault rifle or sniper rifle from more than 100 meters away.

guide.context: The counter may sometimes advance on a closer kill, but the displayed requirement remains over 100 meters. Use a map marker to confirm the distance before delivering the final shot.

steps.text: Carry an assault rifle or sniper rifle with a magnified optic and use map pings to confirm a firing distance beyond @mechanic{100 meters}.
Knock or damage the target at range, then deliver the credited final shot with the eligible assault rifle or sniper rifle.
Repeat until 30 qualifying long-range eliminations register.

achievements.description: Kill 10 players with an assault rifle and/or a sniper rifle from over 100 meters away.
achievements.summary: Eliminate 10 enemies with an assault rifle or sniper rifle from more than 100 meters away.

guide.context: The counter may sometimes advance on a closer kill, but the displayed requirement remains over 100 meters. Use a map marker to confirm the distance before delivering the final shot.

steps.text: Carry an assault rifle or sniper rifle with a magnified optic and use map pings to confirm a firing distance beyond @mechanic{100 meters}.
Knock or damage the target at range, then deliver the credited final shot with the eligible assault rifle or sniper rifle.
Repeat until 10 qualifying long-range eliminations register.

achievements.description: Kill 50 players with grenades.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 50 credited eliminations with Frag Grenade explosions.

guide.context: Knocking a target first makes the explosive finish predictable. The grenade must deal the final damage; a later bleed-out or another player's shot can steal credit.

steps.text: Queue alone into Casual Squads, loot several @item{Frag Grenades}, and knock one or more bots with gunfire.
Reduce each knocked bot's remaining health, cook and throw a Frag Grenade beside its crawl path, and let the explosion deliver the final damage.
Continue until 50 grenade eliminations register.

achievements.description: Kill 30 players with grenades.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 30 credited eliminations with Frag Grenade explosions.

guide.context: Knocking a target first makes the explosive finish predictable. The grenade must deal the final damage; a later bleed-out or another player's shot can steal credit.

steps.text: Queue alone into Casual Squads, loot several @item{Frag Grenades}, and knock one or more bots with gunfire.
Reduce each knocked bot's remaining health, cook and throw a Frag Grenade beside its crawl path, and let the explosion deliver the final damage.
Continue until 30 grenade eliminations register.

achievements.description: Kill 10 players with grenades.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 10 credited eliminations with Frag Grenade explosions.

guide.context: Knocking a target first makes the explosive finish predictable. The grenade must deal the final damage; a later bleed-out or another player's shot can steal credit.

steps.text: Queue alone into Casual Squads, loot several @item{Frag Grenades}, and knock one or more bots with gunfire.
Reduce each knocked bot's remaining health, cook and throw a Frag Grenade beside its crawl path, and let the explosion deliver the final damage.
Continue until 10 grenade eliminations register.

achievements.description: Kill 1000 players by any means.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 1,000 credited enemy or bot eliminations across Battle Royale and Team Deathmatch.

guide.context: Every specialist kill and the 100-kill milestone contributes. Casual Squads provide bot groups, while Team Deathmatch can accelerate unrestricted kills when no specialist counter remains.

steps.text: Complete every weapon, grenade, melee, and vehicle kill achievement before focusing on the remainder.
Use Casual Squads for bot-heavy Battle Royale kills or Team Deathmatch for rapid unrestricted eliminations.
Continue until the account-wide credited kill total reaches 1,000.

achievements.description: Kill 100 players by any means.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 100 enemy or bot eliminations by any means across PUBG matches.

guide.context: Finishing a knocked enemy awards the kill to the player credited with the elimination. Use required pistols, grenades, crossbows, vehicles, and suppressed guns so this total grows during specialist cleanup.

steps.text: Play Casual Squad matches and finish every knocked opponent rather than leaving the elimination to the Blue Zone or another squad.
Keep rotating through unfinished weapon achievements until 100 total kills register.

achievements.description: Kill 10 players by any means.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 10 enemy or bot eliminations by any means across PUBG matches.

guide.context: This counter overlaps every weapon-specific achievement, so no separate farming is necessary if you rotate through the required weapon classes.

steps.text: Use Casual Squad matches to find bot groups and secure eliminations with any weapon or vehicle.
Continue until the account-wide elimination counter reaches 10.

achievements.description: Kill a player by any means.
achievements.summary: Eliminate one enemy player or bot by any means in a Battle Royale match.

guide.context: Casual Mode uses live servers with bot-filled lobbies, and those bot eliminations advance the same Steam achievement counters as player kills.

steps.text: Queue for @mechanic{Casual Mode} and land near a small compound with visible opponents.
Loot any weapon, reduce an enemy or bot to zero health, and confirm the kill in the on-screen feed.

achievements.description: Kill 20 players with bare hands.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 20 credited eliminations with bare-hand punches.

guide.context: A knocked bot can be weakened safely before the punch finish. Holding a melee weapon does not count as bare hands, so holster every weapon before striking.

steps.text: Queue alone into Casual Squads, knock a bot with gunfire, and reduce its remaining health without finishing it.
Holster all weapons so empty fists are visible, then punch the crawling bot until the kill feed records the elimination.
Repeat for 20 bare-hand kills.

achievements.description: Kill at least 4 players in a single match.
achievements.summary: Eliminate at least four enemies or bots during one Battle Royale match.

guide.context: Solo-queuing into Casual Squads places bot teams in groups, which gives more four-kill opportunities than a low-traffic Solo landing.

steps.text: Queue alone into @mechanic{Casual Squads} and land near a compound on the flight path.
Loot a reliable automatic weapon and eliminate four enemies or bots before the match ends.

achievements.description: Headshot and kill 10 enemy players with a sniper rifle.
achievements.summary: Headshot-kill 10 enemies with weapons classified as sniper rifles.

guide.context: The final shot must both be a headshot and come from a sniper rifle. Finishing a stationary knocked bot is more reliable than attempting ten moving headshots.

steps.text: Loot a sniper rifle and enough ammunition, then knock a bot with any weapon.
Aim the sniper rifle at the crawling bot's head and fire the final shot.
Repeat until 10 sniper-rifle headshot eliminations register.

achievements.description: Equip a Lv.3 Helmet, Military Vest, and Backpack in 10 matches.
achievements.summary: Across 10 separate matches, wear the level-three helmet, vest, and backpack at the same time.

guide.context: All three pieces must be worn together during each qualifying match. Care packages are the most concentrated source, but missing pieces may also come from world loot or enemy crates.

steps.text: In each match, search care packages and other loot for the @item{level-three helmet}, @item{level-three vest}, and @item{level-three backpack}.
Equip all three items at the same time and keep a manual tally for that match.
Repeat the complete three-piece loadout in 10 separate matches.

achievements.description: Get the first kill of a match.
achievements.summary: Score the first elimination recorded in a Battle Royale match.

guide.context: The match-wide race starts when players land. Jumping at the first available point and following a nearby bot gives a repeatable chance without hunting a geared opponent later.

steps.text: Queue for Casual Solo or Squads and jump from the plane as soon as the route allows.
Watch for another parachute, land at the nearest weapon spawn, and eliminate that opponent before any other kill appears in the feed.

achievements.description: Kill 10 players with the crossbow.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 10 credited eliminations with the @item{Crossbow}.

guide.context: Crossbows are uncommon ground loot, so treat every find as a cleanup opportunity. Knocking first with a firearm lets one crossbow bolt supply the credited finish.

steps.text: In Casual Squads, search compounds until you find a @item{Crossbow} and bolts.
Knock a bot with another weapon, reduce its remaining health, then use a crossbow bolt for the final damage.
Repeat across matches until 10 crossbow kills register.

achievements.description: Loot 50 items from the carepackage.
achievements.summary: Loot 50 individual items from care packages.

guide.context: The counter tracks items, not opened crates. Take every object from each package, temporarily swapping your own gear if necessary, then restore the preferred loadout after the pickup registers.

steps.text: Land near the map center, secure a vehicle, and watch for a supply plane and its descending care package.
Clear the area, open the package, and move every available item into your inventory or equipment slots.
Repeat with additional care packages until 50 individual item pickups register.

achievements.description: Kill 50 players with suppressed weapons.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 50 credited eliminations with weapons that have suppressors attached.

guide.context: The suppressor must be installed on the weapon that delivers final damage. A suppressed sidearm can finish targets first knocked by a stronger unsuppressed gun.

steps.text: Loot a compatible firearm and suppressor, attach the suppressor, and keep that gun available for finishes.
Knock an enemy or bot, switch to the suppressed weapon, and deliver the final damage.
Repeat until 50 suppressed-weapon eliminations register.

achievements.displayName: Now You See Me, Now You Don't
achievements.description: Equip a ghillie suit for the first time.
achievements.summary: Take a @item{Ghillie Suit} from a care package or dead enemy and equip it.

guide.context: Only some care packages contain a Ghillie Suit. The same unlock can be earned from the loot crate of an enemy who was already wearing one.

steps.text: Reach and open care packages, or eliminate an opponent wearing a Ghillie Suit.
Move the @item{Ghillie Suit} into the outfit slot and confirm it appears on the character.

achievements.description: Jump out from an airplane 101 times.
achievements.summary: Jump from the transport plane in 101 separate Battle Royale matches.

guide.context: Only the jump from the opening aircraft advances this counter; redeploy systems and parachute reuse do not replace another match start.

steps.text: At the beginning of every eligible match, leave the transport plane before it reaches the end of its route.
Repeat across 101 match starts until the cumulative jump counter completes.

achievements.description: Kill 10 players with a gun while in a vehicle.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 10 gun eliminations while seated inside a vehicle.

guide.context: The vehicle need not be moving. In solo play, knock a bot with the vehicle, switch to a passenger seat, and use a firearm for the credited final damage.

steps.text: Drive a multi-seat vehicle in Casual Squads and use an impact to knock a bot without killing it.
Remain in the vehicle, switch from the driver seat to a passenger seat, and shoot the knocked bot until the kill feed confirms the gun elimination.
Repeat for 10 kills made while seated in vehicles.

achievements.description: Revive a knocked-downed teammate.
achievements.summary: Revive one knocked teammate in a Duo or Squad match.

guide.context: A revive requires the teammate to be knocked rather than fully eliminated. Stay in cover because taking damage or releasing the interaction cancels the revive.

steps.text: Queue for Duos or Squads and remain close enough to assist a teammate.
When the teammate is knocked, clear or block the threat, move beside them, and hold @mechanic{Revive} until the progress circle completes.

achievements.description: Equip a suppressed weapon in every weapon slot. Let's find out which weapon is suppressed!
achievements.summary: Simultaneously equip suppressed firearms in both primary weapon slots and the sidearm slot.

guide.context: The straightforward setup is three ordinary firearms with compatible suppressors attached: two primaries plus one pistol.

steps.text: Loot two primary firearms, one pistol, and compatible suppressors for all three weapons.
Attach a suppressor to each firearm and place the guns in both primary slots and the sidearm slot simultaneously.
Keep all three suppressed weapons equipped until @mechanic{Ghost} registers.

achievements.description: Kill another player with the frying pan.
achievements.summary: Deliver the final blow to an enemy or bot with a @item{Frying Pan}.

guide.context: A knocked opponent can be weakened with gunfire before the melee finish, reducing the risk of attempting a full-health pan duel.

steps.text: Loot a @item{Frying Pan} and knock an opponent with a firearm.
Equip the pan, approach the crawling opponent, and strike until the kill feed credits the pan elimination.

achievements.description: Kill 10 players by hitting them with a vehicle.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 10 credited eliminations by striking enemies with a vehicle.

guide.context: A first impact may only knock the target in team modes. Turn around and hit the crawling opponent again so the vehicle supplies the final damage.

steps.text: Find a durable vehicle in Casual Squads and drive through low-traffic bot areas.
Run over a bot; if the impact only knocks it, circle back and strike it again before another cause finishes the kill.
Repeat until 10 vehicle-impact eliminations register.

achievements.description: Wear the outfit of a dead player.
achievements.summary: Take a clothing item from a dead enemy's loot crate and equip that outfit piece.

guide.context: Weapons and armor do not satisfy the outfit condition; equip a wearable cosmetic such as a shirt, trousers, shoes, hat, or jacket from the defeated player's inventory.

steps.text: Eliminate an enemy or find an existing enemy loot crate.
Open the crate, move one clothing item into the matching outfit slot, and confirm that the character model changes.

achievements.description: Get into a vehicle where an enemy player is already in.
achievements.summary: Enter a vehicle after placing a knocked enemy or bot in one of its passenger seats.

guide.context: The carry mechanic avoids waiting for a cooperative enemy driver. Use a vehicle with at least two seats so the enemy can occupy one and you can enter another.

steps.text: In Casual Squads, park a multi-seat vehicle near a bot and knock the bot with gunfire.
Hold the carry interaction on the knocked bot, move to the vehicle, and place the bot into a passenger seat.
Enter the driver seat or another open seat while the enemy remains inside the vehicle.

achievements.description: Charge your boost gauge to the max with energy drink and painkiller overdose.
achievements.summary: Fill the boost gauge to 100% with one Adrenaline Syringe or a Painkiller followed by an Energy Drink.

guide.context: An Adrenaline Syringe fills the gauge immediately. The two-consumable route also reaches exactly 100 boost because a Painkiller adds 60 and an Energy Drink adds 40.

steps.text: Loot an @item{Adrenaline Syringe}, or collect one Painkiller and one Energy Drink.
Use the Adrenaline Syringe, or consume the Painkiller and Energy Drink consecutively, and wait for the boost gauge to reach its maximum.
